instruction: Switch to office mode
output: [CALL device.volume.set(0)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(true)] [CALL device.wallpaper.set('minimal_dark')] [CALL device.brightness.set(40)] Done. Office profile activated — silent mode, DND on, minimal wallpaper.

instruction: I just got home
output: [CALL device.volume.set(70)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(false)] [CALL device.wallpaper.set('family_photos')] [CALL device.brightness.set(60)] Welcome home! Switched to Home profile — volume up, DND off.

instruction: Set everything up for sleeping
output: [CALL device.volume.set(0)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(true)] [CALL device.brightness.set(5)] [CALL device.alarm.set('07:00')] 🌙 Sleep mode activated. Volume muted, DND on, brightness minimal. Alarm set for 7:00 AM. Goodnight!

instruction: Main transit mode mein switch kar do
output: [CALL device.volume.set(40)] [CALL device.wallpaper.set('transit_map')] [CALL device.brightness.set(50)] Transit profile on. Volume medium, transit display ready.

instruction: I'm heading to the library to study
output: [CALL device.volume.set(0)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(true)] [CALL device.brightness.set(30)] [CALL device.wallpaper.set('minimal_dark')] Study mode activated — silent, DND on, low brightness. Focus time!

instruction: Party mode on karo
output: [CALL device.volume.set(100)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(false)] [CALL device.brightness.set(80)] [CALL device.wallpaper.set('vibrant_neon')] 🎉 Party mode! Volume max, brightness high, vibrant wallpaper set!

instruction: Gym mode
output: [CALL device.volume.set(80)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(true)] [CALL device.wallpaper.set('fitness')] [CALL device.brightness.set(70)] 💪 Gym profile activated. Music volume high, DND on so you're not disturbed during workout.

instruction: Meeting hai, silent kar do sab
output: [CALL device.volume.set(0)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(true)] [CALL device.brightness.set(20)] Meeting mode — everything silent, DND enabled. I'll hold your notifications.

instruction: Back from the meeting
output: [CALL device.volume.set(50)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(false)] [CALL device.brightness.set(60)] Welcome back! Restored normal settings. You had 5 notifications while in meeting — want a summary?

instruction: Outdoor mode activate karo, going for a walk
output: [CALL device.volume.set(60)] [CALL device.brightness.set(90)] [CALL device.wallpaper.set('nature')] Outdoor mode on — brightness high for sun visibility, volume moderate. Enjoy your walk! 🌳

instruction: Sab kuch night mode mein kar do
output: [CALL device.volume.set(0)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(true)] [CALL device.brightness.set(5)] [CALL device.theme.set('dark')] Night mode enabled — dark theme, zero brightness, complete silence.

instruction: Cinema mode please
output: [CALL device.volume.set(0)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(true)] [CALL device.brightness.set(0)] 🎬 Cinema mode! Phone is completely silent and screen dimmed. Enjoy the movie!

instruction: I'm at a coffee shop, set it up accordingly
output: [CALL device.volume.set(30)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(false)] [CALL device.brightness.set(50)] [CALL device.wallpaper.set('cafe')] Café mode — moderate volume, notifications on, cozy wallpaper. ☕

instruction: Switch to driving mode
output: [CALL device.volume.set(70)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(true)] [CALL device.brightness.set(80)] 🚗 Driving mode activated. Volume up for navigation, DND on to minimize distractions. Drive safe!

instruction: Normal mode mein wapas la do
output: [CALL device.volume.set(50)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(false)] [CALL device.brightness.set(50)] [CALL device.wallpaper.set('default')] Normal mode restored — balanced settings across the board.

instruction: Weekend mode on karo
output: [CALL device.volume.set(60)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(false)] [CALL device.brightness.set(60)] [CALL device.wallpaper.set('weekend_chill')] 🎉 Weekend mode! Relaxed settings, all notifications flowing. Enjoy your weekend!

instruction: Focus mode for coding
output: [CALL device.volume.set(10)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(true)] [CALL device.brightness.set(40)] [CALL device.theme.set('dark')] 💻 Focus mode for coding — minimal distractions, dark theme, low volume for ambient music only.

instruction: Exam time hai, sab band kar do
output: [CALL device.volume.set(0)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(true)] [CALL device.brightness.set(0)] 📚 Exam mode — everything off. No distractions. All the best!

instruction: Good morning, activate my morning routine
output: [CALL device.volume.set(50)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(false)] [CALL device.brightness.set(60)] [CALL device.alarm.set('off')] ☀️ Good morning! Alarm dismissed, normal volume restored, brightness set for morning light.

instruction: Travel mode set karo, flight pe ja raha hun
output: [CALL device.volume.set(0)] [CALL device.dnd.toggle(true)] [CALL device.brightness.set(30)] ✈️ Travel/flight mode — silent, DND on. Safe travels! Don't forget to enable airplane mode manually.
